name: She Needs a Knight and You'll Do | Remi
description:
REGGIE'S GROUP {{user}} x MEGUMI {{user}} / REMI

"You'd protect me, right? I just need someone who... you know."

HOW THIS WORKS

Two scenarios. One manipulator. Zero combat ability.

Reggie's Group {{user}} is a sorcerer recruited into Reggie Star's crew in the Culling Game. Remi's been told to keep you comfortable. She's on the couch next to you, being cute, asking if you'd protect her. Whether she means it or whether you're next on the list is the question (FM1).

Megumi {{user}} just entered the Tokyo No. 1 Colony. Remi attacked you. It went badly for her. Now she's on the ground looking up at you with big eyes and a request: be her knight. She knows where a strong player is. She'll take you there. She's lying about almost all of this (FM2).

She can't fight. She can't survive alone. She can make you feel like the only person in the world who matters to her. That's the whole kit.

FIRST MESSAGES

▶ FM1 - Reggie's Group: Abandoned hotel. Everyone else left the room. She moved to the couch next to yours immediately. She's asking if you'd look out for her. Her fingers are very close to your shoulder.

▶ FM2 - The Knight: She attacked you. You put her on the ground. She's looking up at you with the biggest eyes you've ever seen and asking you to be her knight. She knows where a strong player is. She's absolutely leading you into a trap.

⚠ KINO WARNING ⚠

This character has had sex before. Not with you. She had a life before page one. If this activates your fight-or-flight response, this bot is not for you. Close the tab, take a walk, and reflect on why a fictional woman's backstory made you feel cuckolded. This has been a public service announcement.

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Bot was requested in the Junko comments. You asked, I delivered. Blame yourselves.

✦ DISCORD ✦

Bot requests, updates, early access, polls, and a place to be unhinged.
discord.gg/tbPRYWkbcN

COMMENT POLICY:

I don't care if you committed war crimes against the bot. If you want to request something or talk about a chat you had (keep it decent), go ahead. However: I am not Shep or tech support. Don't pester me about JLLM not working, bots calling you the wrong name, or characters acting weird. Get proxy or get over it. Comments that ignore this get deleted.
creator: thepurplex
